# AI Instructions — See CLAUDE.md

The authoritative AI context for this project has moved to **`CLAUDE.md`** at the repository root.

Read `CLAUDE.md` first. It contains:
- Project identity and principles
- Technology stack
- Coding standards (TypeScript, C#, Git)
- Development workflow and scripts
- AI agent guidelines and task management
- Key file map

The original detailed instructions from this file have been consolidated into `CLAUDE.md` and the linked documentation in `docs/`.
